groups.description: Time, side, and BTC path features only; no Polymarket quote/liquidity inputs.
Adds cheap-side bid/ask, spread, and complement pricing.
Adds top-of-book size, 5-level depth, and depth imbalance.
Adds recent Up/Down trade notional and signed trade flow.
All non-wallet base EV model features.
All base features plus prior-qualified large-wallet flow features.

interpretation: Feature ablation found pooled-positive EV thresholds in 2/6 groups, but none passed the day-stability gate. The best pooled group is btc_path_quote_depth with test AUC 0.785. Highest raw AUC is btc_path_quote_depth at 0.785.
